celery.description: Celery distributed task queue patterns for background workers and scheduled jobs.

background_worker.description: Celery task-decorated functions acting as distributed worker entry points.

task_definition.description: Celery task-decorated functions that act as worker/beat entry points.

periodic_task_schedule.notes: Validator should confirm the call target is imported from `celery.schedules` (or an alias bound to it). Treat generic local helpers like `schedule(...)` as non-matches unless the import provenance clearly resolves to Celery's scheduling APIs.
